sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 102 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1354/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2026 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo, advocate for the respondent. Pursuant to order dated 21.10.2025 counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper; in the interests of justice and revenue the impugned order be set aside and the matter may be remanded to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh expeditiously, preferably within 90 days and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Counsel for the applicant has no objection to the aforesaid and states that the matter may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
